str_389F884D: Everything around was shining, living its bustling midday life. Only me and my mind were drowning in the eternal darkness of dreams and anxieties.
str_230FBFC5: I left the police station, and my body was enveloped by the summer rays of the sun.
str_4E2BEA7B: I saw Edwin near the station.
str_788ED5B6: I still can't believe this happened.
str_3AE7F403: Let's go. The apartment I told you about is quite close from here.
str_AC6DE31F: We walked slowly along the sun-drenched path.
str_A68BB796: I wanted to say something to Edwin, to start a conversation with him. But after meeting the officer, it seemed I couldn't utter another word.
str_BD658377: A multi-story building appeared in the distance.
str_C83C9DD0: I followed Edwin and didn't even notice how we ended up at the apartment's front door.
str_80DB296D: It's a very small studio apartment. But unfortunately, there are no more free ones.
str_9F1797E4: It's fine. Thank you so much for deciding to help me.
str_E99758C1: Don't mention it. The situation you're in is truly terrible.
str_FB370954: Edwin, listen, I don't remember anything from last night. Tell me what happened?
str_E41E06BD: At the club, you and Miranda had a big fight. You got drunk.
str_BF27C531: You said you didn't want to communicate with her anymore. That your friendship was a mistake.
str_7383A4DB: Miranda said your friendship was a mistake, but those words angered and hurt you.
str_26B579F4: Earlier, you decided that the future should bring you new friends.
str_2D134709: Earlier, you decided that your friendship with Miranda wasn't worth losing.
str_4C53244D: After the concert, we wanted to have a drink with you, but you were clearly in a bad mood and went back to the beach.
str_6CF35B3A: And when we came by boat to check on you in the morning, we found Miranda's body on the beach, not far from the tent.
str_BE7C5B50: I couldn't believe Edwin's words. Did we really argue yesterday?
str_74995E95: It was certainly a common occurrence for us, but not under these circumstances.
str_1C2D97A5: You don't remember anything at all?
str_3F96D8C0: But why? Did you really drink that much?
str_31A4ABA0: Miranda and I took drugs yesterday.
str_E20C1822: I had a couple of cocktails.
str_A68D88B2: I think someone spiked my drinks with drugs.
str_E4B39187: I don't know, she pressured me into it.
str_00D9730A: But who could it have been?
str_0BEBFE12: I don't know. Maybe someone who wished us harm.
str_0D051A09: I hope the police figure it out. Now come here.
str_D21D955A: Edwin reached out his arms to embrace me.
str_B2EF8FE3: His gentle smile made me feel a little better, as if protected from the outside world and everything that was happening.
str_CB6F9CD2: Bury my face in Edwin's chest
str_032F5288: Of course. I'll leave you alone.
str_FBF2C5F8: Sorry, now is not the time. I just want to be alone.
str_646FD0BF: Edwin slowly stroked my hair and whispered in my ear: "Everything will be okay."
str_DC35E72D: His hands moved down to my back, with light touches gliding along my spine towards my buttocks.
str_DAE90B6E: Then he pressed his lips to mine.
str_ADD5A0EF: His scent drove me crazy. From the gentle touch of his lips, my legs seemed to turn to jelly. They no longer held me.
str_D5EC1B3A: He understood and scooped me up in his arms, then gently lowered me onto the bed.
str_A15A741D: I want to kiss your fragile shoulders for an eternity.
str_2139C64A: He whispered, running his hand through my hair.
str_40097656: Edwin kissed me, moving lower and lower. A moan of pleasure escaped my chest.
str_818B0F32: That day, I gave myself to him completely.
str_207FBF4A: We lay in bed for a long time afterwards.
str_F8DC2100: I tried to press myself closer to him, so as not to be alone.
str_2A4BE7C4: Sorry, but I have to go to work now. Maybe see you in the evening at the bar?
str_658B6315: After Edwin left, I wrapped myself in a blanket and slept for a couple more hours.
str_92F83306: Leaving the station, I went to the address Mark had sent me.
str_3EDC5DF9: Walking slowly along the sun-drenched path, I tried to distract myself with any innocent thought that could save me from myself.
str_D3684EEF: I wanted all my worries to disappear, but the officer's words, Miranda's death, and whoever was behind it kept swirling in my head.
str_00EE49A8: After walking a bit through the park, I saw a small multi-story building. This was probably my destination.
str_1F8B13EC: Following the last instructions of the navigator, I saw Mark standing at the door of the building.
str_B7891923: Hi. I hope you haven't been waiting for me long?
str_5373570C: No, I just came out. Are you okay?
str_6D442D57: Yeah, sorry. Stupid question. Let's go.
str_1AEB27B1: I followed Mark into the building.
str_8827858E: He lived on the second floor in a small two-room apartment.
str_5A75B5FF: It's a bit cramped here, but I hope it suits you.
str_B283500F: It's fine. I feel bad for intruding on you.
str_C2FD9191: Don't worry about that. It's boring here alone.
str_5A8ACE93: Here, I prepared my room for you, and I'll set up in the living room.
str_32644A26: Thank you, that's very kind of you.
str_F95CF1D4: Okay, I'll leave you alone, get some rest.
str_86C0792C: Yes. The last thing I want is to be alone.
str_C1DFDC18: Mark came closer, and I couldn't help but cling to him in an embrace that, I thought, should save me from the impending realization of reality.
str_8F29F34A: Mark's arms wrapped around my shoulders and pressed me even tighter against his warm body.
str_EC1507B1: The beat of his heart seemed to penetrate me, hypnotically lulling me into calm and oblivion.
str_9CDAB221: Small waves of ecstasy ran through my body.
str_2077BD71: The blissful indifference to reality was interrupted by the touch of his thin fingers on my neck.
str_E5500875: I involuntarily moaned trying to inhale, but only met his lips, and we merged in a passionate kiss.
str_F28BAA46: His hand slipped under my lace panties and continued to caress me slowly.
str_6358DEDE: I bit my lip, holding back moans.
str_58E737B0: Meanwhile, he guided my hand to the zipper of his trousers.
str_765FF267: We continued to caress each other, intoxicated by passion.
str_251DA104: And when his fingers tightened around my neck, a relaxing languor spread throughout my body.
str_37DEF6CD: Mark and I lay on the bed for another twenty minutes or so, as the sun's rays gently caressed our naked bodies.
str_2D005E46: Mark left to the other room, and I was left alone with myself.
str_D1C58F99: The whirlpool of thoughts dragged me into the darkness, and I didn't notice how I fell asleep on the bed.
str_2FF2A5FD: When I woke up, Mark was no longer home. On the table by the door lay keys and a note:
str_0CB8F5D0: "Sorry, I have to go. I'll be at the bar in the evening if you want to get out of the house."
str_23931495: No, don't leave me alone, please
str_1CBAED51: I left the station and saw a notification on my phone screen.
str_C2E753CA: Mom did send me some money to my card after all.
str_6C76D9EA: It's very little, but I can try to find some kind of apartment.
str_FF77D9B3: I looked for accommodation options for a couple of days while walking along the sun-drenched road.
str_D4934E60: Of all the offers, I had enough money for a very modest but clean apartment.
str_2ECA1B26: I contacted the landlord, and he said I could move in right away.
str_A9E5AE25: I continued my way through the park.
str_BEEE1376: Upon arrival, I found the door key in the mailbox.
str_298A1201: The apartment didn't look very tidy, but it still seemed like a better option than sleeping on the street.
str_9543949B: The events of the day were simply knocking me off my feet. And I didn't notice how I fell asleep immediately.
str_CF3908C6: As soon as I left the station, I immediately started counting the money left in my bag.
str_881990D0: There were only pennies left, but I still decided to try to find some kind of lodging.
str_778AAEAD: Of all the possible options, I had enough money for a very dirty and small apartment.
str_867EA097: Upon arrival, I found the apartment key in the mailbox.
str_86CF0A55: The apartment didn't look great, but it still seemed like a better option than sleeping on the street.
str_117730C4: When I woke up, it was still light in the room. I must have only slept for a couple of hours.
str_45A22C82: Thoughts kept swirling in my head: "What to do next?".
str_F0CB9EB8: I needed to find out exactly what happened last night.
str_59976C81: And there was only one way to find out - to go back to the beach.
str_CF962172: I took the bag that the officer returned to me in the morning. It had a tracksuit in it.
str_8ED10693: At least it's not Miranda's clothes. I definitely need to change.
str_176C13FB: Suddenly I heard the sound of my phone.
str_70CF36D1: A message arrived from the officer.
str_11F067BC: Alice, I need to talk to you. Clarify a couple of details.
str_5906F432: I'd like to go back to the beach. Maybe we could meet there?
str_2DB7707F: Okay, I'll wait for you at the spot in 30 minutes.
str_B0CFCB94: When I got to the beach, the officer was already there.
str_9DB32742: We've already greeted each other, Alice.
str_3DBCAC02: You have a good relationship with the Officer.
str_6A8220DA: You don't have a good enough relationship with the Officer.
str_2FEBAE38: I found that man who scared you on the beach.
str_FB43ABB0: He doesn't have an alibi, but it doesn't look like him. We took his DNA samples and fingerprints, we'll see what that gives us.
str_CC548626: Earlier, the officer was interested in your words about the strange man.
str_41402E88: However, Alice, he said that you behaved extremely aggressively yesterday.
str_622CDF07: Yes, I was a bit aggressive, but that's because he scared us and said strange things.
str_4D11F7BC: That's not true. That old man attacked me.
str_E6ED85CB: Alice, everything in this case is against you.
str_68873E84: I believe you. He really did look strange.
str_26A2D685: Earlier, you did not dare to fight back against the old man.
str_BE20D321: He said Miranda was acting aggressive, but you seemed calm to him.
str_288399A6: He looked very frightening. Miranda was just trying to protect me.
str_A5A20EC3: Miranda wanted to attack him. I think he could have come back to the beach to take revenge.
str_77855906: The officer thinks you are telling the truth.
str_531FB906: The officer was interested in your words.
str_536D836B: Either way, we'll wait for the forensic experts' conclusion.
str_52CC3158: Tell me in more detail, how did she die?
str_7EAF76B9: Tell me briefly, how did she die?
str_84FA7260: It was definitely a violent death. There are signs of strangulation, numerous bruises. But she died from a head injury caused by a blunt object, presumably a stone. Sometime between 4-8 AM.
str_655F14C6: From a head injury, most likely caused by a stone.
str_41531F41: Alice, I need to know where you were at night, and who could have wished Miranda dead.
str_894B9091: If we can't find suspects by the end of the week, we'll have to arrest you.
str_589215B1: I'll try to find out more about last night.
str_383706CE: I'll try to ask about him at the bar tonight. Maybe I'll be able to find him.
str_29D33DBB: If any information comes up, write to me.
str_7A82ADE1: That guy you mentioned, Tom. I still haven't been able to find him.
str_4A2B8AE4: Unfortunately, the wind tore the tent down during the night, and we couldn't find the rest of your things.
str_551DF3E1: We also collected samples from the tent. Maybe we'll find someone's DNA there.
str_81F5BFF1: You set up the tent incorrectly.
str_D4A9577D: You set up the tent correctly.
str_D4F21948: Sorry, but I found nothing like that in the area.
str_9BB51ED0: I have to go. Try to find out something about last night, it really could help you.
str_A9974636: The officer headed towards the park, and I stayed on the beach.
str_9B267875: The sun setting into the water seemed to set the sea and sand on fire. Everything around was immersed in red hues.
str_145CF5B4: Just yesterday, Miranda and I were here together.
str_D2C5E099: Just yesterday, our whole lives were ahead of us.
str_D48BE14E: And today - one of us is in the morgue, and the other is a hair's breadth away from prison.
str_7E2FE548: I flinched at the unexpected phrase spoken in a familiar voice.
str_ACC893E1: Better tell me, why aren't you behind bars yet?
str_1BA3CD82: A nasty grin slipped across Tom's face.
str_F83DAB0D: I shouldn't be there. But what about you?
str_ABCB4CD1: You know, it's too strange that you don't remember anything.
str_B04E9650: No stranger than you constantly hanging around here.
str_028E293A: If only I could remember that.
str_563B4874: You need to come to the station. I mentioned you to the police, but they couldn't find you.
str_D17310CF: You need to come to the station.
str_BB473C21: Well, if they didn't find me, maybe that's how it should be?
str_C579FC77: You might have seen something useful for the case, since you were with us at the club yesterday.
str_EB5564F6: But you were the only one who bought me a drink.
str_3F0E3D55: With one cocktail? Don't make me laugh, girl.
str_AA8E47E9: I think you're in a very unfavorable position. Everyone thinks you killed her.
str_09BD87E2: You don't remember anything. Yesterday, you both were clearly in a bad mood. You have no alibi.
str_58D7ABB0: Alice, how well do you know yourself?
str_0FCDC2A2: And again that nasty grin spread across his face.
str_50E965A0: Could I have killed someone dear to me?
str_2559E73F: I know myself well enough to understand that it wasn't me.
str_096CE253: I don't seem to know who I am at all.
str_946DB1B8: Listen to me, I'll give you one piece of advice.
str_D2ABF2DB: It doesn't matter if it was you or not. What matters is whether you want to say goodbye to your life and spend a decade behind bars.
str_3E08211C: I think you need to figure out how to shift police suspicion onto someone else.
str_8F12C37D: Behind bars? What are you talking about!
str_AE900485: Could I really go to jail for a crime where my guilt isn't proven?
str_4E3E3708: I don't know what to do.
str_1997B737: That's wrong. I can't do that.
str_CD7B6EF9: Apparently, this is the only way out for me.
str_77E3C12A: It's up to you. I'd better go. In light of recent events, it's not safe to be around you.
str_E2CEB946: The slippery, nasty grin appeared on his face again.
str_F1D8AF30: Could I really be arrested for murder? For the first time since Miranda's death, I truly believed that I could end up in prison.
str_C96F562D: I need to find out what happened last night and find the killer before it's too late.
str_9FB3BB44: I headed along the same route that led us to the club yesterday.
str_DE74F26D: Yesterday, there was definitely something strange here in the bushes. Too bad I didn't dare to look.
str_F66F7397: Yesterday, there was a pentagram here. It's worth checking. Maybe it's a clue.
str_2150111A: I went straight into the thicket. The branches refracted the last rays of the sun, which clung to my body like threads, trying to wrap me from the inevitable darkness.
str_F1AE79D8: Foul smells filled my lungs and poisoned my consciousness like poison. This smell permeated me through and through.
str_9C610F08: The suffocating smells of rot, sulfur, and smoke hung in the air.
str_98081576: Every breath felt like the last.
str_571CA13A: And the darkness, like the earth, buried me in oblivion.
str_8FAE71BD: A whisper came from behind the trees.
str_CA133CCB: No one answered. Am I hallucinating?
str_FBAF8669: Shadows flickered all around. They swirled around me, reaching their thin fingers towards me through the tree branches and grass.
str_FF83CB43: Voices came from all sides. Someone was calling me, but I couldn't tell where the sound was coming from. It seemed to circle around me as the shadows blocked out the last remnants of light.
str_E670E3D7: The shadows pulled me down and bound my entire body, as if tying me with ropes to the damp earth. I was plunged into complete darkness.
str_71AF33E5: I tried to scream, but couldn't push a single sound out of my throat.
str_9B0DF80D: My body wouldn't obey me. I was immobilized, mute, and only my eyes continued to stare into the dark abyss. Staring into the void.
str_75D12922: I heard someone's footsteps approaching me, but my body wouldn't let me turn my head.
str_DD665C80: Through the tears in my eyes, I saw Miranda's face.
str_0AC5993B: She doesn't deserve... She doesn't deserve.
str_9BFF8A33: Miranda's face came close to mine. She grabbed my head and water gushed from her mouth.
